subcodes.first_line: O beloved companion! That which thou didst write and the secret thou didst cherish within hath been made known and revealed, becoming a source of joy unto the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار جانی آنچه نگاشتی و راز درون داشتی معلوم و مکشوف شد و سبب سرور یاران
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @universal peace; world unity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God, @love of God
